reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the player state atlas and switch states by swapping atlas handles on one PlayerStateSprite entity.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_prisoner_fall_4f_8fps.png through AssetServer during player bootstrap and cache the atlas under player_prisoner_fall_4f_8fps.
runtime_notes: Animation timing follows the base 8 fps fall cadence in FixedUpdate.
The sprite origin stays centered on the torso so brake variants inherit a stable pivot.
Logical collision bounds remain 12x22 px regardless of cloth motion.

context.usage: Default descent state used whenever no friction input is active and the player is dropping through open space.

shape.silhouette: Slim prisoner silhouette with bent knees, trailing tunic hem, one raised hand, and ankle shackles that swing during descent.

appendages.accessories: Ankle shackles and a short waist chain.

specs.texture: One-step dither on tunic shadows and chipped iron highlights on the shackles.
specs.shading: Flat pixel shading with a single darker pass on the underside of the torso.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 64x24 px with four 16x24 frames.
Shackle chain swing remains inside a 2 px horizontal envelope so collision bounds stay stable.
The orange shackle accent stays visible in every frame against the darkest background band.
